MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Robert F. Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Gateway Global Communications Ltd., a corporation.
Declaration of Lorna Walker in Support of Default Judgment on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant TALK FREE, INC., A CORPORATION, DBA VOKKA, ADBA, TALKACTIVE, ADBA TALK ACTIVE, ADBA T ACTIVE, ADBA TALKACTIVE TALK, ADBA TA TALK, ADBA GVT, ADBA TFV, ADBA NWV, ADBA TALKATIVE, ADBA TAT, ADBA PINOY TALK, ADBA PINOY PAY, ADBA NEW WORLD VOIP, ADBA DIAMONDFONE, ADBA ACTIONRATE, ADBA HABLARVOIP, ADBA HABLABARATO, ADBA HABLAMASVOIP, ADBA DIAMONFONE, ADBA NXN, ADBA JXD, ADBA MOBEEBACK, ADBA MOBEECALLS, ADBA MOBEECHEAP, ADBA MOBEEWISE, ADBA MOBEEFREE, ADBA MBF, ADBA GCC LTD, ADBA TRIPOLI CO, ADBA AHRAM TF, ADBA MUMBAI TF INC., ADBA TF HYDER CORP,
